item_text: this activity diagram models the process of navigating through a profile section, specifically focusing on the home icon click and validation of fields. if fields are correctly filled, the user can save changes or discard them. if fields are not correctly filled, the user needs to correct the data before proceeding. the diagram also includes a loop for data correction if necessary.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profilemanagement-006 title: validate profile fields and correct data with loop module: profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in test data: incomplete profile fields test steps: 1. click 'profile' in the sidebar menu 2. verify that the profile page is displayed 3. click on the blue house icon 4. verify that the dwellings screen is displayed 5. verify that the fields are incomplete 6. correct the fields 7. click 'save changes' 8. verify that the changes are saved successfully 9. verify that the fields are now complete 10. try to save changes again without further corrections 11. verify that the validation fails and user is prompted to correct the fields 12. correct the fields again 13. click 'save changes' 14. verify that the changes are saved successfully expected result: changes are saved successfully after correcting the fields twice.
